items.title_en: Luxury stocks fall as Iran war weighs on earnings; Hermes sinks 14%
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争影响盈利，奢侈品股下跌；爱马仕下跌 14%
items.desc_en: Hermes said wholesale activity was "significantly affected" in the first quarter by lower sales to concession stores, particularly in the Middle East and in airports.
items.desc_zh: 爱马仕表示，第一季度批发活动受到特许商店销售额下降的“严重影响”，特别是在中东和机场。

items.title_en: Australian pleads guilty to creating deepfake porn in landmark case
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚人承认在具有里程碑意义的案件中制作深度伪造色情内容
items.desc_en: The 19-year-old is the first person to be charged under a new national law.
items.desc_zh: 这位 19 岁的男子是第一个根据新的国家法律受到指控的人。

items.title_en: Kanye West postpones France gig until further notice
items.title_zh: 坎耶·维斯特 (Kanye West) 推迟法国演出，直至另行通知
items.desc_en: It comes a week after the UK announced it would block the rapper from entering the country, where he was due to headline a music festival in summer.
items.desc_zh: 一周前，英国宣布将阻止这位说唱歌手进入该国，他原定于夏季在英国的一场音乐节上担任主角。

items.title_en: Why Wells Fargo says it might be time to take profits on energy — even as the bank hikes its oil price forecasts
items.title_zh: 为什么富国银行表示现在可能是在能源领域获利了结的时候了——尽管该银行上调了油价预测
items.desc_en: Oil prices are likely to remain well above their levels prior to the Iran war, the consequences of which have choked global supply for the foreseeable future.
items.desc_zh: 油价可能仍远高于伊朗战争前的水平，其后果在可预见的未来抑制了全球供应。

items.title_en: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张
items.desc_en: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.
items.desc_zh: 网约车公司滴滴计划今年晚些时候在阿拉伯联合酋长国开始其首次海外机器人出租车测试。

items.title_en: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime'
items.title_zh: 特朗普在称教皇利奥“打击犯罪软弱”几天后再次瞄准他
items.desc_en: Trump's remarks came amid a running spat between the White House and the Vatican over the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普发表此番言论之际，白宫和梵蒂冈之间就美以对伊朗的战争不断发生争执。

items.title_en: Chip giant ASML raises 2026 guidance as AI semiconductor demand stays strong
items.title_zh: AI半导体需求保持强劲，芯片巨头ASML上调2026年业绩指引

items.desc_zh: ASML 超出第一季度营收和利润预期，并上调 2026 年销售指引。

items.title_en: European markets eye mixed open as traders assess Iran war latest

items.desc_en: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory on Wednesday as regional traders assess the trajectory of the U.S.-Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 由于地区交易员评估美伊战争的轨迹，预计欧洲股市周三开盘涨跌互现。

items.title_zh: 国会议员埃里克·斯瓦尔韦尔发出不受欢迎的明确信息后，原告寻求正义
items.desc_en: He denies claims of sexual assault but admits " mistakes" and says he will resign.
items.desc_zh: 他否认性侵犯指控，但承认“错误”并表示将辞职。

items.title_en: JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
items.title_zh: JD万斯在压倒性失败后为支持“伟人”欧尔班的竞选活动辩护
items.desc_en: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.
items.desc_zh: 这位美国副总统表示，匈牙利领导人是一位“伟大的人”，做得“非常好”，但他确信自己可以与彼得·马扎尔合作。

items.title_en: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
items.title_zh: 中国称美国封锁伊朗港口不负责任且危险
items.desc_en: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".
items.desc_zh: 中国是伊朗石油的最大买家，表示美国的海上封锁破坏了“本已脆弱的停火”。

items.title_en: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦官员称哈马斯拒绝加沙解除武装计划
items.desc_en: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.
items.desc_zh: 这位官员告诉英国广播公司，在以色列完全遵守其承诺之前，武装组织不会推进谈判。

items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。
